title: +### 4.1 Environment Setup
content:
+### 4.1 Environment Setup
+
+1. **Define Repository Structure** – Create separate directories for modules (phonology, morphology, syntax, etc.), core hypergraph, visualization, ethics gates and meta‑learning.
+2. **Initialize Dependencies** – Install or reference frameworks (PyTorch, huggingface transformers, graph databases) and mathematical libraries (category‑theory DSLs or graph grammar libs).
+3. **Set Environment Variables** – Export variables such as `PROJECT_NAME`, `MODES`, `LANGS`, `SEM_SIM_MIN`, `TOXICITY_MAX`, `OUT_DIR` for configuration.
+
+### 4.2 Module Implementation
+
+1. **Hypergraph Core** – Develop the central representation using a graph database or custom hypergraph library. Define node/edge schemas for phonetic, morphological, syntactic, semantic, pragmatic, discourse and sociolinguistic units.
+2. **Input Intake Engine** – Build pipelines for text (tokenizers, morphological analyzers), audio (speech‑to‑text, prosodic feature extraction), image (OCR and icon recognition), and gesture (pose detection). Map outputs into the hypergraph.
